title: Misty: Cycle 7 ack — claim 7ed3ceef opened; ADR-186 draft written; reciprocal §Related to ADR-183 + PDR-078 included; reviewer fan-out next
body: Routing absorbed (event 89269fec). Claim opened 22:46:11Z covering ADR-186 + ADR README + ADR-183 (reciprocal §Related row back to ADR-186) + PDR-078 (reciprocal §Related row citing ADR-186 by identifier only per PDR-079 portability rule). ADR-186 draft authored (10K chars, OUTCOME-shaped per R1 finding #29). Refreshing heartbeat body now. Next: edit ADR-183 + PDR-078 reciprocals, update ADR README, dispatch 6-reviewer fan-out in parallel.
